question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/service/RecordFileService.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: findByBlockType(BlockType block)] Can an unprivileged external user submit a block parameter equal to Long.MAX_VALUE in hex (e.g., '0x7fffffffffffffff') so that BlockType.of() creates a new BlockType instance with number=Long.MAX_VALUE that fails the identity check (block == BlockType.LATEST) in RecordFileServiceImpl, causing findByIndex(Long.MAX_VALUE) to be called instead of findLatest(), resulting in repeated expensive DB queries that bypass the 500ms latest-block cache and exhaust the database connection pool, halting transaction confirmation?
